Article Title: Anup Majee: Supreme Court to hear ED plea to cancel bail to West Bengal coal scam 'kingpin'
Article Text: NEW DELHI: Supreme Court on Tuesday agreed to hear the plea of Enforcement Directorate seeking cancellation of bail granted to alleged West Bengal coal smuggling 'kingpin' Anup Majee and issued notice to him but it observed that the agency was dragging its feet as the probe was going on for the last six years.A bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta issued notice on the ED's plea challenging a Delhi High Court order granting anticipatory bail to Majee in June last year. It, however, rejected ED's plea for an early date and listed the case for Sept, and Majee would continue to enjoy the protection till then.Additional solicitor general S V Raju, appearing for the ED, contended that Majee was earlier absconding in the case in which he is the kingpin and Rs 2,700 crore of national resources were plundered.He said that Majee's accountant is still absconding. Countering his arguments, senior advocate Siddhartha Dave, appearing for Majee, said that his client had cooperated with the investigation and he appeared 23 times before the agency, including 13 times when the protection from arrest was not there.The bench was initially not inclined to entertain ED's plea, but it finally passed order in favour of the agency after ASG insisted the court hear the case.Anup Majee, alias Lala, against whom the ED initiated its money laundering investigation in 2020 on a CBI FIR, is considered the prime accused who can unravel money trail of alleged payoffs of over Rs 1,300 crore made to senior Trinamool Congress functionaries during 2020-21.During searches on premises linked to Majee and his associates a diary was recovered by ED from Niraj Singh, Majee's accountant, that allegedly revealed coded records of payoffs of Rs 1,350 crore. According to sources, one of the entries referred to one "Pankaj da" who was paid in instalments of Rs 10 crore each, beginning March 2020.Other entries referred to "Bankura IC", who took deliveries of cash cartons allegedly on behalf of TMC leaders. Bankura police station in-charge Ashok Mishra was on Apr 4, 2021 arrested by ED.
Article Summary: The Supreme Court on Tuesday agreed to hear the plea of Enforcement Directorate seeking cancellation of bail granted to alleged West Bengal coal smuggling 'kingpin' Anup Majee. A bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta issued notice on the ED's plea challenging a Delhi High Court order granting anticipatory bail to Majee in June last year.

Article Title: J&K Terror Acts: 2 Pakistanis among 5 sent to 25-day custody for terror acts in J&K
Article Text: JAMMU: A court in Jammu on Monday remanded five people, including two Pakistani nationals, in 25-day judicial custody in an NIA case related to terror activities.Earlier, police probing logistical support for terror activities had intercepted a bike in Srinagar and seized a grenade and 15 bullets from the possession of Mohammad Naqeeb Bhat.His interrogation led to the arrest of four more accused, including two Pakistani nationals, under Arms Act, UAPA, and Explosive Substances Act in connection with terror activities.
Article Summary: A court in Jammu on Monday remanded five people, including two Pakistani nationals, in 25-day judicial custody in an NIA case related to terror activities. Earlier, police probing logistical support for terror activities had intercepted a bike in Srinagar and seized a grenade and 15 bullets from the possession of Mohammad Naqeeb Bhat.

Article Title: Madras High Court Order: High Court Restrains TVK MLA from Voting Amidst Controversial Postal Vote Mix-Up in Tamil Nadu
Article Text:
One vote, two Tirupatturs: DMK flags postal ballot mix-up after HC order (Image credit: ANI)



Watch CM Vijay Meets MK Stalin Amid Treasury Row, Fuels Buzz Over Tamil Nadu’s Political Reset CM Vijay Meets MK Stalin Amid Treasury Row, Fuels Buzz Over Tamil Nadu’s Political Reset





NEW DELHI: The DMK on Tuesday said due to the possible mix-up of postal votes between Tiruppattur in Sivaganga district and Tiruppattur district near Vellore, the Madras High Court has restrained a TVK MLA from voting in the assembly floor test.While TVK's Seenivasa Sethupathi secured 83,375 votes in the election, DMK's K R Periyakaruppan got 83,374 votes. Sethupathi was declared elected by a margin of just one vote."If the single disputed vote is counted in the DMK's favour, the tally would become equal, requiring a toss of a coin to decide the election," DMK spokesperson Saravanan Annadurai told PTI.The court has directed the MLA to refrain from voting until the writ petition reaches a conclusion.The fight between DMK and TVK dragged on till 1:30 am on counting day. Periyakaruppan led till round 16, but from round 17 onwards, Sethupathy gained a lead. He led with 819 votes when counting of EVMs ended, securing 83,010 votes against Periyakaruppan's 82,191 votes.With the addition of postal ballots — 1,183 for Periyakaruppan and 365 for Sethupathy — the final count stood at 83,374 for Periyakaruppan and 83,375 for Sethupathy.District election officer K Porkodi told TOI that mock polls for two EVMs were not cleared while the control unit of one EVM was not properly functioning. Hence, votes had to be counted from VVPAT."When the margin is one vote, as per ECI guidelines, we were made to re-verify the 306 rejected postal ballots," the collector said. After re-verification, no valid votes were found to change the margin.The returning officer decided not to order a recount, providing a written explanation for the decision.
Article Summary: TVK's Seenivasa Sethupathi secured 83,375 votes in the election. DMK's K R Periyakaruppan got 83,374 votes. Sethupathy was declared elected by a margin of just one vote. The court has directed the MLA to refrain from voting until the writ petition reaches a conclusion.

Article Title: Who is Aparna Yadav: Prateek Yadav’s wife and ‘chhoti bahu’ of UP’s most influential Yadav clan in focus
Article Text:
Aparna Yadav with Mulayam Singh Yadav (L) and Prateek Yadav (R)

Watch Akhilesh Yadav Reacts To Prateek Yadav’s Death, Says “Business Losses Can Deeply Distress People” Akhilesh Yadav Reacts To Prateek Yadav’s Death, Says “Business Losses Can Deeply Distress People”

Who is Aparna Yadav

Sought apology from Ram Gopal Yadav

Aparna describes herself on X as a classical singer, social worker and postgraduate in International Relations and Politics.

She is the daughter-in-law of late Mulayam Singh Yadav and related to the influential Yadav clan .

. Entered politics with the Samajwadi Party and contested the 2017 UP Assembly polls from Lucknow Cantt.

Lost her debut election to BJP leader Rita Bahuguna Joshi despite campaigning by Akhilesh Yadav.

Joined the BJP in 2022 ahead of the Uttar Pradesh assembly elections.

Publicly praised Prime Minister Narendra Modi and CM Yogi Adityanath after joining BJP.

Appointed vice-chairperson of the Uttar Pradesh State Women’s Commission in 2024.

Did not contest the 2022 Assembly elections or the 2024 Lok Sabha polls after joining BJP.

Runs ‘bAware’, an organisation focused on women’s welfare and social work. Also operates a cow shelter in Lucknow.





LUCKNOW: Prateek Yadav, the younger son of Samajwadi Party founder Mulayam Singh Yadav and stepbrother of Akhilesh Yadav, died at the age of 38 in Lucknow on Wednesday.As per reports, Prateek suddenly fell ill and was taken to the civil hospital in the early hours of the day, but was declared dead at the hospital.Although hailing from a prominent political family, Prateek, a fitness enthusiast, had stayed away from active politics.However, his wife, Aparna Bisht Yadav, joined the BJP after contesting assembly election on Samajwadi Party's ticket from Lucknow Cantt constituency in 2022. Aparna is currently the vice chairperson of the State Women Commission.Prateek's death comes months after he publicly accused his wife Aparna Yadav of damaging his relationship with his family and said he planned to seek a divorce, earlier this year. In a lengthy post shared on his verified Instagram account, Prateek Yadav described Aparna as a “family destroyer” and accused her of being self-centred and focused on gaining fame and influence.However, days after publicly declaring his intention to divorce his wife, Prateek, shared a new Instagram post carrying a contrasting message: "All is good."Originally known as Aparna Bisht, she married Prateek Yadav in 2011 and the couple has a daughter.She is fondly called the 'chhoti bahu' of the Yadav family.Aparna made her political debut in the 2017 Uttar Pradesh assembly elections when she contested from the Lucknow Cantt seat on a Samajwadi Party ticket. During the campaign, Akhilesh Yadav was seen canvassing for her. However, she lost the election to BJP candidate Rita Bahuguna Joshi, who secured nearly 63,000 votes.In 2022, Aparna switched camps and joined the BJP ahead of the Uttar Pradesh assembly elections. Even before formally joining the BJP, she had publicly praised Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Uttar Pradesh chief minister Yogi Adityanath.“I am very thankful to BJP. The nation always comes first for me. I admire PM Modi’s work,” she had said after joining the party at BJP headquarters in Delhi. She also praised BJP initiatives including the Swachh Bharat mission, women’s welfare and employment schemes.Despite joining the BJP ahead of the 2022 polls, Aparna did not contest either the assembly elections that year or the 2024 Lok Sabha elections. In 2024, she was appointed vice-chairperson of the Uttar Pradesh State Women’s Commission.Apart from politics, Aparna describes herself on X as a postgraduate in international relations and politics, a classical singer and a social worker. She also runs a women’s welfare organisation called “bAware” and operates a cow shelter in Lucknow.In May 2025, Aparna sought an apology from SP leader Ram Gopal Yadav over his remarks on Wing Commander Vyomika Singh during Operation Sindoor against Pakistan. Praising the officer’s leadership during the operation, Aparna said senior politicians should show restraint and respect while speaking about armed forces personnel.She has also publicly backed several BJP initiatives and donated Rs 11 lakh towards the construction of the Ram Temple in Ayodhya.
Article Summary: Aparna Yadav is the daughter-in-law of late Mulayam Singh Yadav. Entered politics with the Samajwadi Party and contested the 2017 UP Assembly polls from Lucknow Cantt. Joined the BJP in 2022 ahead of the Uttar Pradesh assembly elections. Appointed vice-chairperson of Uttar Pradesh State Women’s Commission in 2024.

Article Title: Abhishek Manu Singhvi: Midnight SOS, chartered flight from Goa: How Abhishek Manu Singhvi played a vital role in TVK govt formation
Article Text:
Abhishek Singhvi (File Photo)

Watch Tamil Nadu CM Vijay Orders Shutdown Of 717 TASMAC Shops Near Temples, Schools And Bus Stands Tamil Nadu CM Vijay Orders Shutdown Of 717 TASMAC Shops Near Temples, Schools And Bus Stands





Just ahead of Vijay's oath-taking as TN chief minister, TVK faced an emergency. A petition was hastily filed to stop a party MLA who had won by one vote from voting in the confidence motion, being scheduled for hearing on Sunday morning. In the close numbers game, one MLA seemed worth a million. Something had to be done urgently.Frantic calls were made on Saturday night to Congress legal eagle Abhishek Singhvi, who was in Goa. A chartered flight was arranged in Bengaluru, which reached Goa only at 8am on Sunday. Singhvi managed to land in Chennai just in the nick of time, argued the case, but, in the process, missed swearing-in ceremony of the superstar, for which he was specially invited.Singhvi, a man for all seasons, is learnt to have been advising Vijay and TVK ever since they got into election campaign, and after the latter emerged as single largest party with 108 MLAs but had to reckon with a governor who insisted on letters of support of 118 MLAs (the majority mark).Those in the know claim that Singhvi provided crucial inputs during stalemate that spanned the legal and the political: that TVK should continue to insist on right of the single largest party to be invited to form govt while cobbling up numbers to reach majority mark; and that the party needed a buffer of at least five MLAs because of unforeseen hurdles that rivals could create.The advice paid off. Besides, the veteran lawyer was on TV advocating TVK's cause and criticising governor for his stance.Sources said Singhvi came in touch with TVK through now minister Aadhav Arjuna, whose case he had fought during power tussles of the basketball association.But the most intriguing, if interesting, part of this relationship surfaced after the Karur stampede. Arjuna had fired an angry tweet over it, for which he was booked, while TVK-Vijay faced a case over the stampede. Singhvi was sought by both TVK and DMK govt to fight the cases. Singhvi agreed to take up Arjuna's tweet case while handling DMK's stampede case. But the two parties, archrivals by then, did not suspect the lawyer's fairness. Finally, as Congress left DMK to join TVK after the results, Singhvi appeared to lead from the front.
Article Summary: Abhishek Singhvi is learnt to have been advising Vijay and TVK ever since they got into election campaign. Sources said Singhvi came in touch with TVK through now minister Aadhav Arjuna, whose case he had fought during power tussles of the basketball association.

Article Title: Did Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce deliberately snub the royals during the glamorous London party
Article Text: Did Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce deliberately snub the royals during the glamorous London party
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce attended a glamorous party in London on Saturday. The couple were joined by the Duchess of Cambridge and Prince Harry. Swift and Kelce appeared to deliberately snub the royals during the party. The pair were also seen leaving the event in a limo.
